Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-E2E: Verify successful login as System Admin redirects to Home page
Precondition: User has valid System Admin credentials. Application is accessible at [MODERNIZED_APPLICATION_URL].
Objective: To verify a System Admin user can log in and is redirected to the Home page at /home/index.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed at the OIDC domain. 'Sign in to Diligent One Platform' heading is visible with 'Email' and 'Password' input fields and 'Sign in' button.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated in the 'Email' field.
Password is entered and displayed as masked dots.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the BoardEffect Home page. URL is /home/index and page title is 'Welcome to BoardEffect Homepage'.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the page heading 'Home' is displayed in the main content area
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Home' heading is visible in the main content area confirming successful navigation.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click profile avatar button in the top system bar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Profile dropdown opens showing user display name and navigation options including 'Sign Out'.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Sign Out' link in the profile dropdown
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is logged out and redirected to the login page. Login form is displayed.

Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-Functional: Verify login fails and error is shown when incorrect password is entered
Precondition: User is on the login page. An incorrect password is used intentionally.
Objective: To verify login fails and an error message is displayed when an incorrect password is entered.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed with 'Email' and 'Password' input fields.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated in the 'Email' field.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter an incorrect password in the 'Password' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Incorrect password is entered and displayed as masked dots.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Error message is displayed on the login page. User is not redirected and remains on the login page.

Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-Functional: Verify login fails when the email field is left empty
Precondition: User is on the login page. Email field is intentionally left empty.
Objective: To verify login fails and a validation error is shown when the email field is submitted empty.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed with 'Email' and 'Password' input fields.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Leave the 'Email' field empty and enter password in the 'Password' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: 'Password' field is populated. 'Email' field remains empty.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Validation error is displayed. User is not redirected. 'Email' field is highlighted or an inline error message is shown.

Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-E2E: Verify 'Sign Out' successfully logs out the user and redirects to the login page
Precondition: User is logged in as System Admin on the Home page.
Objective: To verify clicking 'Sign Out' ends the user session and redirects to the login page.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.
Password is entered.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the Home page at /home/index.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click profile avatar button in the top system bar
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Profile dropdown opens showing 'Sign Out' option.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is logged out. Browser is redirected to the login page. 'Email' and 'Password' input fields are displayed. User is no longer authenticated.

Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-Functional: Verify login success info alert is displayed on the Home page immediately after login
Precondition: User has valid System Admin credentials.
Objective: To verify an info alert with 'You have successfully logged in' message appears on the Home page after a successful login.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.
Password is entered.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the Home page.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the login success info alert is visible in the main content area
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Info alert is displayed containing text 'You have successfully logged in. You last signed in on [date/time].' with a 'Dismiss' button.
Profile dropdown opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the login page.

Name: MOD-Home-HomeDashboard-Functional: Verify login success info alert can be dismissed via the Dismiss button
Precondition: User is logged in as System Admin. Login success info alert is visible on the Home page.
Objective: To verify clicking 'Dismiss' on the login success alert removes it without affecting any other page content.
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Login page is displayed.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Enter login email in the 'Email' field
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Email value is populated.
Password is entered.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=button name="Sign in" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the Home page. Login success info alert is visible.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Verify the login success info alert is visible
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: Info alert is visible in the main content area.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Step: Click 'Dismiss' button on the login success info alert
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: The info alert is dismissed and removed from the page. All other page content remains unchanged.
Profile dropdown opens.

Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Test Data: locator: role=link name="Sign Out" | value: none
Test Script (Step-by-Step) - Expected Re: User is redirected to the login page.
